codeReview.summary: The follow-up patch directly fixes the prior over-collection bug in `buildCountryCoOccurrences()`: instead of widening from one successful title match to all occurrences from both countries, it now records only the specific event IDs that participate in passing cross-country title comparisons. The updated regression test proves the unrelated Pentagon budget story is excluded while the Iran-related Pentagon stories and explicit multi-country event still appear in the IR-US drilldown.

summary: Pass. The fix now keeps entity-derived geopolitical arc drilldowns limited to the specific cross-country stories that actually satisfy the relevance gate.
